hero.title: Hellhole Wiki
hero.description: Hellhole is a Roblox PvE horror shooter where players descend floor by floor into a demonic underworld, battling enemies and bosses, upgrading weapons, and surviving the depths. The only way out is down.

gameFeature.title: Hellhole Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Explore surreal biomes, fuse items with Apotheosis, and survive strange creatures in this dreamlike voxel sandbox on Steam.

hellholeBeginnerGuide.title: Hellhole Beginner Guide
hellholeBeginnerGuide.intro: Hellhole is a Roblox PvE horror shooter where players descend through dangerous underground floors, fight hostile creatures, collect resources, and upgrade their equipment. This beginner guide explains the essential steps every new player should understand before starting a run.

steps.title: Learn Basic Controls
steps.description: Understand movement, aiming, shooting, interacting with objects, and managing your equipment before entering deeper areas.

steps.title: Start Your First Descent
steps.description: Enter Hellhole and explore each floor carefully while learning enemy behavior and environmental dangers.

steps.title: Fight and Survive
steps.description: Use your weapons efficiently, avoid unnecessary fights, and focus on surviving encounters with hostile creatures.

steps.title: Collect Money and Resources
steps.description: Gather rewards during runs to improve your equipment and prepare for harder floors below.

steps.title: Upgrade Your Loadout
steps.description: Improve your combat ability by choosing stronger weapons and useful upgrades for future attempts into deeper floors.

quickTips: Take time to learn enemy attack patterns before pushing into deeper floors of Hellhole.
Save your money for meaningful upgrades instead of spending it on every available option.
Keep an eye on your ammunition and resources so you are ready for sudden enemy encounters.
The only way out is down, so prepare your loadout carefully before descending further.

hellholeGameplayGuide.title: Hellhole Core Gameplay Mechanics
hellholeGameplayGuide.intro: The main gameplay loop of Hellhole focuses on descending through dangerous areas, defeating enemies, earning resources, and improving your chances of reaching deeper floors. Players need to balance exploration, combat, and upgrades to complete successful runs.

cards.name: Floor Descent System
cards.description: Players progress through multiple underground floors where challenges become increasingly dangerous the deeper they go.

cards.name: PvE Combat
cards.description: Fight hostile monsters using weapons and movement strategies while managing limited resources during every encounter.

cards.name: Enemy Encounters
cards.description: Each run introduces dangerous encounters that require careful positioning, timing, and awareness of your surroundings.

cards.name: Money and Rewards
cards.description: Collect money during gameplay to improve equipment and increase your chances of survival on future runs.

cards.name: Upgrade Progression
cards.description: Use earned resources to strengthen your setup and prepare for the enemies waiting on deeper floors.

hellholeWeaponsGuide.title: Hellhole Weapons and Combat Strategy
hellholeWeaponsGuide.intro: Weapons are essential for surviving Hellhole encounters. Players need to understand their available equipment, manage ammunition, and select effective combat approaches when facing different enemy situations on each floor.

items.name: Primary Weapons
items.description: Main combat tools used for dealing consistent damage during enemy encounters throughout your descent.

items.name: Weapon Upgrades
items.description: Improve combat performance by investing resources into stronger equipment choices for deeper floors.

items.name: Close Combat Strategy
items.description: Use positioning and movement carefully when enemies approach at short range in tight underground spaces.

items.name: Long Range Strategy
items.description: Maintain distance and control enemy encounters whenever the layout of the floor allows it.

items.name: Loadout Management
items.description: Choose equipment that matches your play style and the specific challenges of the floors you plan to explore.

hellholeEnemiesGuide.title: Hellhole Enemy Types and Survival Tips
hellholeEnemiesGuide.intro: Hellhole features hostile creatures that challenge players throughout their descent. Understanding enemy behavior, attack patterns, and safe combat methods helps players survive longer runs and reach deeper floors.

enemies.behavior: Attack players during exploration and combat encounters on every floor.
enemies.strategy: Maintain awareness, manage distance, and avoid taking unnecessary damage during fights.

enemies.behavior: Use aggressive attacks to pressure players during dangerous encounters.
enemies.strategy: Observe attack patterns carefully and use your weapons efficiently to break their pressure.

enemies.behavior: Different areas introduce increasing dangers as players descend into deeper floors.
enemies.strategy: Move carefully and prepare your equipment before entering floors with stronger threats.

hellholeTipsAndTricks.title: Hellhole Tips and Tricks for Better Runs
hellholeTipsAndTricks.intro: Hellhole rewards careful movement, smart resource management, and steady decision-making. These tips help players survive longer, avoid common mistakes, and make more efficient progress through dangerous floors.

tips.title: Manage Your Resources Carefully
tips.content: Avoid wasting ammunition and healing resources early in a run. Save important supplies for harder encounters and the deeper floors below.

tips.title: Move Carefully Through Floors
tips.content: Explore areas cautiously instead of rushing forward. Checking your surroundings helps avoid unexpected enemy encounters and dangerous situations.

tips.title: Learn Enemy Patterns
tips.content: Pay attention to enemy movement and attack timing. Understanding patterns allows you to react faster and take less damage during fights.

tips.title: Upgrade Before Pushing Deeper
tips.content: Spend earned money wisely between runs to improve your equipment and increase your chances of surviving the harder floors below.

tips.title: Avoid Common Beginner Mistakes
tips.content: Do not rush into unknown areas, waste valuable resources on easy fights, or ignore progression upgrades that help you reach deeper floors.

hellholeBossGuide.title: Hellhole Boss Battles and Strategies
hellholeBossGuide.intro: Boss encounters are some of the most challenging moments in Hellhole. Players must recognize attack patterns, maintain positioning, and prepare suitable equipment before facing the stronger enemies waiting on deeper floors.

bosses.name: Floor Boss Encounters
bosses.strategy: Focus on learning attack patterns, avoiding unnecessary damage, and attacking during safe openings between boss attacks.
bosses.recommended: Balanced loadout with reliable damage and enough survival resources for a long fight.

bosses.name: Deep Floor Challenges
bosses.strategy: Prepare upgraded equipment and coordinate movement carefully during the dangerous encounters of the deepest floors.
bosses.recommended: Use your strongest available upgrades before attempting the deeper sections of Hellhole.

hellholeUpgradesAndProgress.title: Hellhole Upgrades and Progression Guide
hellholeUpgradesAndProgress.intro: Progression in Hellhole depends on making smart upgrade decisions and improving your ability to survive increasingly difficult encounters. Efficient spending helps players reach deeper areas faster and handle stronger enemies.

upgrades.title: Early Progression
upgrades.description: Prioritize upgrades that improve survival and consistency during your early runs into Hellhole.

upgrades.title: Resource Management
upgrades.description: Use earned money strategically instead of spending everything immediately on temporary advantages.

upgrades.title: Deep Run Preparation
upgrades.description: Build stronger equipment setups before attempting harder floors and stronger enemies below.

upgrades.title: Long-Term Growth
upgrades.description: Continue improving through repeated runs and better upgrade choices as you push deeper.

hellholeUpdatesAndNews.title: Hellhole Updates, Changes, and News
hellholeUpdatesAndNews.intro: This section helps returning players quickly check major Hellhole changes, including new floors, gameplay improvements, and future content announcements for the Roblox PvE horror shooter.

updates.title: New Floors and Content
updates.content: Track additions that expand the descent experience with new areas, challenges, and encounters on deeper floors.

updates.title: Gameplay Changes
updates.content: Follow balance updates, improvements, and changes that affect how players approach each Hellhole run.

updates.title: Boss and Enemy Updates
updates.content: Check announcements related to new threats, boss encounters, and combat adjustments across the floors.

updates.title: Community Announcements
updates.content: Keep up with important developer messages and information for active Hellhole players.

faq.title: Hellhole
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Hellhole, the Roblox PvE horror shooter.

questions.question: What is Hellhole on Roblox?
questions.answer: Hellhole is a Roblox PvE horror shooter where players descend floor by floor into a demonic underworld, battling enemies and bosses while upgrading weapons and surviving the depths. The only way out is down.

questions.question: Is Hellhole a singleplayer or multiplayer game?
questions.answer: Hellhole is a PvE horror shooter on Roblox. Players descend through dangerous underground floors, fight hostile creatures and demons, and upgrade their equipment as they push deeper into the underworld.

questions.question: Where can I play Hellhole?
questions.answer: You can play Hellhole directly on Roblox through the official game page. It runs inside the Roblox platform on PC, mobile, and other supported devices.

questions.question: How does progression work in Hellhole?
questions.answer: In Hellhole, players earn money during runs and spend it on weapon and equipment upgrades. These upgrades help you survive deeper floors, defeat stronger enemies, and take on the bosses waiting below.

questions.question: What kind of enemies will I face in Hellhole?
questions.answer: Hellhole features hostile creatures and demon enemies across multiple floors, with boss encounters on deeper levels that require preparation, pattern reading, and an upgraded loadout to survive.

questions.question: Does Hellhole receive updates with new content?
questions.answer: Yes. Hellhole continues to receive updates that add new floors, bosses, enemies, and gameplay improvements, giving players more challenges to explore as they descend further into the underworld.
